expression.expression: (LAG(Month_End_Date, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY prophecy_row_id NULLS FIRST))
(LEAD(Month_End_Date, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY prophecy_row_id NULLS FIRST))

CAST((CASE WHEN (CAST((SUBSTRING( v_AccountType, 1, 1)) AS string) = 'T') THEN 'Treaty' WHEN (CAST((SUBSTRING( v_AccountType, 1, 1)) AS string) = 'O') THEN 'FAC - External' ELSE 'Not RI Acct' END) AS string)
CAST((CASE WHEN CAST((`Trading Partner` IN ('111111', '222222')) AS BOOLEAN) THEN 'FAC - IPS' ELSE 'Blank' END) AS string)
CAST('Cube_Update_APRA Output from APRA ROL' AS string)
(CASE WHEN (in0.Source = in1.Source) THEN in1.Source ELSE NULL END)

(
  TO_DATE(
    (
      CASE
        WHEN (
          (
            CAST((
              coalesce(
                CAST((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 5, 2)) AS DOUBLE), 
                CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 5, 2)), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 
                0)
            ) AS DOUBLE) IN (
              CAST(1 AS DOUBLE),
              CAST(3 AS DOUBLE),
              CAST(5 AS DOUBLE),
              CAST(7 AS DOUBLE),
              CAST(8 AS DOUBLE),
              CAST(10 AS DOUBLE),
              CAST(12 AS DOUBLE)
            )
          )
          AND (
                (
                  coalesce(
                    CAST((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 7, 2)) AS DOUBLE), 
                    CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 7, 2)), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 
                    0)
                ) > 31
              )
        )
          THEN (CONCAT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)), '-', (SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 5, 2)), '-31'))
        WHEN (
          (
            CAST((
              coalesce(
                CAST((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 5, 2)) AS DOUBLE), 
                CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 5, 2)), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 
                0)
            ) AS DOUBLE) IN (CAST(4 AS DOUBLE), CAST(6 AS DOUBLE), CAST(9 AS DOUBLE), CAST(11 AS DOUBLE))
          )
          AND (
                (
                  coalesce(
                    CAST((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 7, 2)) AS DOUBLE), 
                    CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 7, 2)), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 
                    0)
                ) > 30
              )
        )
          THEN (CONCAT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)), '-', (SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 5, 2)), '-30'))
        WHEN (
          (
            (
              (
                (
                  coalesce(
                    CAST((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 5, 2)) AS DOUBLE), 
                    CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 5, 2)), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 
                    0)
                ) = 2
              )
              AND (
                    (
                      coalesce(
                        CAST((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 7, 2)) AS DOUBLE), 
                        CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 7, 2)), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 
                        0)
                    ) > 29
                  )
            )
            AND (
                  (
                    PMOD(
                      (
                        coalesce(
                          CAST((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)) AS DOUBLE), 
                          CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 
                          0)
                      ), 
                      4)
                  ) = 0
                )
          )
          AND (
                (
                  (
                    NOT(
                      (
                        PMOD(
                          (
                            coalesce(
                              CAST((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)) AS DOUBLE), 
                              CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 
                              0)
                          ), 
                          100)
                      ) = 0)
                  )
                  OR (
                       (
                         PMOD(
                           (
                             coalesce(
                               CAST((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)) AS DOUBLE), 
                               CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 
                               0)
                           ), 
                           100)
                       ) IS NULL
                     )
                )
                OR (
                     (
                       PMOD(
                         (
                           coalesce(
                             CAST((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)) AS DOUBLE), 
                             CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 
                             0)
                         ), 
                         400)
                     ) = 0
                   )
              )
        )
          THEN (CONCAT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)), '-', (SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 5, 2)), '-29'))
        WHEN (
          (
            (
              (
                coalesce(
                  CAST((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 5, 2)) AS DOUBLE), 
                  CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 5, 2)), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 
                  0)
              ) = 2
            )
            AND (
                  (
                    coalesce(
                      CAST((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 7, 2)) AS DOUBLE), 
                      CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 7, 2)), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 
                      0)
                  ) > 28
                )
          )
          AND (
                NOT(
                  (
                    (
                      PMOD(
                        (
                          coalesce(
                            CAST((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)) AS DOUBLE), 
                            CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 
                            0)
                        ), 
                        4)
                    ) = 0
                  )
                  AND (
                        (
                          (
                            NOT(
                              (
                                PMOD(
                                  (
                                    coalesce(
                                      CAST((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)) AS DOUBLE), 
                                      CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 
                                      0)
                                  ), 
                                  100)
                              ) = 0)
                          )
                          OR (
                               (
                                 PMOD(
                                   (
                                     coalesce(
                                       CAST((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)) AS DOUBLE), 
                                       CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 
                                       0)
                                   ), 
                                   100)
                               ) IS NULL
                             )
                        )
                        OR (
                             (
                               PMOD(
                                 (
                                   coalesce(
                                     CAST((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)) AS DOUBLE), 
                                     CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 
                                     0)
                                 ), 
                                 400)
                             ) = 0
                           )
                      ))
              )
        )
          THEN (CONCAT((SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)), '-', (SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 5, 2)), '-28'))
        ELSE (
          CONCAT(
            (SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 1, 4)), 
            '-', 
            (SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 5, 2)), 
            '-', 
            (SUBSTRING(sDateCalc, 7, 2)))
        )
      END
    ), 
    'yyyy-MM-dd')
)

CAST((CASE WHEN (pPeriod <= 0) THEN (coalesce(CAST((DATE_FORMAT((DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CAST(-27 AS INTEGER))), 'yyyyMM')) AS DOUBLE), CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((DATE_FORMAT((DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CAST(-27 AS INTEGER))), 'yyyyMM')), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 0)) ELSE pPeriod END) AS INTEGER)
CAST((CASE WHEN ((`TZAC Code` IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(`TZAC Code`)) = 0)) THEN `Manual TZAC Map` ELSE `TZAC Code` END) AS string)

CAST((
  CASE
    WHEN (
      (
        coalesce(
          CAST((DATE_FORMAT((ADD_MONTHS(Month_End_Date, -1)), 'yyyyMM')) AS DOUBLE), 
          CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((DATE_FORMAT((ADD_MONTHS(Month_End_Date, -1)), 'yyyyMM')), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 
          0)
      ) = (
        coalesce(
          CAST((DATE_FORMAT((DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CAST(-27 AS INTEGER))), 'yyyyMM')) AS DOUBLE), 
          CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((DATE_FORMAT((DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CAST(-27 AS INTEGER))), 'yyyyMM')), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 
          0)
      )
    )
      THEN FullPath
    ELSE '\\ms.zurich.com.au\\DFS\\AlteryX\\Prod\\Finance\\Reinsurance Processes\\MHC and APRA Reporting\\04_Inputs\\S2TP DUMMY.TXT'
  END
) AS VARCHAR (1000))
CAST((CASE WHEN (v_TZAC = '') THEN 'Unallocated' ELSE v_TZAC END) AS string)
CAST((SUBSTRING( CAST(pPeriod AS string), 1, 4)) AS string)
(CASE WHEN (in0.v_Reinsurer = in1.Reinsurer) THEN in1.`Share percent` ELSE NULL END)

CAST((CASE WHEN (v_TZAC = '') THEN 'Unallocated' ELSE v_TZAC END) AS string)

properties.sqlQuery:
DECLARE @pPeriodEnd VARCHAR(16);
SET @pPeriodEnd = 'pPeriodEnd_INPUT';

SELECT 
	  SUBSTRING([EXT_ACCV_ACCT_KEY_01],2,1) AS v_Company
      ,SUBSTRING([EXT_ACCV_ACCT_KEY_01],3,7) AS v_Reinsurer
      ,[EXT_ACCV_ACCT_BRCH_01] AS v_RIBranch
	  ,[EXT_ACCV_TZAC_CODE] AS v_TZAC
      ,[EXT_ACCV_ACT_TYPE] AS v_AccountType
	  ,POL_STMT.EXT_STMT_NETT_AMT AS v_OSDebtors
	  ,CONCAT (POL_STMT.EXT_STMT_DESC1, ' ', POL_STMT.EXT_STMT_DESC2) AS v_DebtorsDesc
	  ,POL_STMT.EXT_STMT_DATE_EFFECT AS v_DateEffect
	  ,SUBSTRING(POL_STMT.EXT_STMT_BATC_KEY, 10,4) AS v_TransType
	  ,CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(POL_STMT.EXT_STMT_BATC_KEY, 10,4)='Q025'
                   OR SUBSTRING(POL_STMT.EXT_STMT_BATC_KEY, 10,4)='C004'
                   OR SUBSTRING(POL_STMT.EXT_STMT_BATC_KEY, 10,4)='C013'
                   OR POL_STMT.EXT_STMT_JOURNAL_FLAG = 'C'
			THEN 'C'
			ELSE 'P'
			END AS v_Type
	  ,POL_STMT.CTL_SRC_ROW_ID AS v_STMTID
	  ,@pPeriodEnd AS v_EndOfMonth
	  ,CAST(CAST([EXT_STMT_DUE_YEAR] AS VARCHAR(4)) + 
		RIGHT('0' + CAST([EXT_STMT_DUE_MONTH] AS VARCHAR(2)),2) +
		SUBSTRING(CAST([EXT_STMT_DATE_EFFECT] AS VARCHAR(8)),7,2)
		AS decimal) AS v_DateCalc
  FROM [FINDB].[src].[POL_ACCV_01]
  LEFT JOIN [FINDB].[src].[POL_STMT] ON POL_ACCV_01.EXT_ACCV_ACCT_KEY_01 = POL_STMT.EXT_STMT_ACNO_KEY
  WHERE EXT_ACCV_CODE = '01'
  AND EXT_ACCV_VALID_FLAG = 1
  AND EXT_ACCV_ACT_TYPE IN('OL', 'OP', 'LP', 'TP', 'TX')
  AND POL_STMT.EXT_STMT_MARRY_FLAG IS NULL
  AND POL_STMT.EXT_STMT_NETT_AMT IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY v_STMTID

expression.expression:
CAST((
  CASE
    WHEN ((DAY((TO_TIMESTAMP((REGEXP_REPLACE(Month_End_Date, '\\.\\d+', '')), 'ddMMyyyy')))) <= 3)
      THEN (
        TO_TIMESTAMP(
          (
            TO_TIMESTAMP(
              (
                REGEXP_REPLACE(
                  (CONCAT('01', (SUBSTRING(Month_End_Date, (((LENGTH(Month_End_Date)) - 6) + 1), 6)))), 
                  '\\.\\d+', 
                  '')
              ), 
              'ddMMyyyy')
          ))
      )
    WHEN ((DAY((TO_TIMESTAMP((REGEXP_REPLACE(Month_End_Date, '\\.\\d+', '')), 'ddMMyyyy')))) >= 27)
      THEN (
        TO_TIMESTAMP(
          (
            TO_TIMESTAMP(
              (
                REGEXP_REPLACE(
                  (
                    CONCAT(
                      '01', 
                      (
                        DATE_FORMAT(
                          (ADD_MONTHS((TO_TIMESTAMP((REGEXP_REPLACE(Month_End_Date, '\\.\\d+', '')), 'ddMMyyyy')), 1)), 
                          'MMyyyy')
                      ))
                  ), 
                  '\\.\\d+', 
                  '')
              ), 
              'ddMMyyyy')
          ))
      )
    ELSE (TO_TIMESTAMP((REGEXP_REPLACE(Month_End_Date, '\\.\\d+', '')), 'ddMMyyyy'))
  END
) AS VARCHAR (1000))
CAST((CASE WHEN (Count = 0) THEN 'No APRA Unmapped.txt' ELSE 'APRA Unmapped.xlsx' END) AS string)
CAST((CASE WHEN (v_Sign = '-') THEN ((CAST(v_Value AS INTEGER) / 100) * -1) ELSE (CAST(v_Value AS INTEGER) / 100) END) AS DOUBLE)
CAST((CASE WHEN (v_ProductCode = 'ZZZ') THEN 'None' ELSE v_ProductCode END) AS string)
CAST((CASE WHEN (v_PremiumClass = 'ZZZ') THEN 'None' ELSE v_PremiumClass END) AS string)

CAST((CASE WHEN (pPeriod <= 0) THEN (coalesce(CAST((DATE_FORMAT((DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CAST(-27 AS INTEGER))), 'yyyyMM')) AS DOUBLE), CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((DATE_FORMAT((DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CAST(-27 AS INTEGER))), 'yyyyMM')), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 0)) ELSE pPeriod END) AS INTEGER)

CAST((coalesce(CAST((CONCAT((SUBSTRING( CAST((REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((FORMAT_NUMBER(CAST(pPeriod AS DOUBLE), 0)), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')) AS string), 1, 4)), '01')) AS DOUBLE), CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT((CONCAT((SUBSTRING( CAST((REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((FORMAT_NUMBER(CAST(pPeriod AS DOUBLE), 0)), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')) AS string), 1, 4)), '01')), '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INTEGER), 0)) AS INTEGER)

CAST((CASE WHEN CAST((`Trading Partner` IN ('111111', '222222')) AS BOOLEAN) THEN 'FAC - IPS' ELSE 'Blank' END) AS string)
(CASE WHEN (in0.v_TZAC = in1.TZAC) THEN NULL ELSE in0.pPeriod END)
(CASE WHEN (in0.v_TZAC = in1.TZAC) THEN NULL ELSE in0.`Share percent` END)
CAST((CASE WHEN (REPLACEMENT_PATH = 'PLACEHOLDER') THEN FullPath ELSE REPLACEMENT_PATH END) AS string)
(CASE WHEN (in0.v_Reinsurer = in1.Reinsurer) THEN in1.`TZAC Code` ELSE NULL END)

(CASE WHEN (in0.v_Reinsurer = in1.Reinsurer) THEN in1.`Account Branch` ELSE NULL END)

in1.* EXCEPT(`Reinsurer`, `Account Type`, `Account Name`, `Account Branch`, `TZAC Code`, `CRR`, `Deemed`, `FAC Account Type`, `Broker`, `Address 1`, `Address 2`, `Address 3`, `Postcode`, `GST No`, `Manual TZAC Map`)

properties.sqlQuery:
SELECT
       SUBSTRING([EXT_RTRN_BATC_KEY],4,4) AS v_AccountingYear,
       SUBSTRING([EXT_RTRN_BATC_KEY],8,2) AS v_AccountingMonth,
       SUBSTRING([EXT_RTRN_RI_ACCT],2,1) AS v_Company,
       POL_ACCV_01.EXT_ACCV_ACCT_BRCH_01 AS v_AccountBranch,
       SUBSTRING([EXT_RTRN_RI_ACCT],3,7) AS v_Reinsurer,
       POL_ACCV_01.EXT_ACCV_ACT_NAME AS v_RIName,
       POL_ACCV_01.EXT_ACCV_TZAC_CODE AS v_TZAC,
       POL_ACCV_01.EXT_ACCV_ACT_TYPE AS v_AccountType,
       SUM([EXT_RTRN_RI_PREM]) AS v_RWP,
       POL_POLY.EXT_POLY_POL_BRANCH AS v_PolBranch,
       SUBSTRING([EXT_RTRN_POLY_KEY],2,7) AS v_Policy,
       SUBSTRING([EXT_RTRN_POLY_KEY],9,3) AS v_ProdClass,
       [EXT_RTRN_RISK_NUMBER] AS v_RiskNo,
       [EXT_RTRN_RISK_CLASS] AS v_RiskClass,
       [EXT_RTRN_PREM_CLASS] AS v_PremClass
  FROM [FINDB].[src].[POL_RTRN]
  LEFT JOIN [FINDB].[src].[POL_ACCV_01] ON POL_RTRN.EXT_RTRN_RI_ACCT = POL_ACCV_01.EXT_ACCV_ACCT_KEY_01
  LEFT JOIN [FINDB].[src].[POL_POLY] ON POL_RTRN.EXT_RTRN_POLY_KEY = CONCAT(POL_POLY.EXT_POLY_POL_COMPANY, POL_POLY.EXT_POLY_POLICY, POL_POLY.EXT_POLY_POLS_TYPE)
  WHERE 
  SUBSTRING([EXT_RTRN_BATC_KEY],4,6) in (ytdPeriod_INPUT)
  GROUP BY
       SUBSTRING([EXT_RTRN_BATC_KEY],4,4),
       SUBSTRING([EXT_RTRN_BATC_KEY],8,2),
       SUBSTRING([EXT_RTRN_RI_ACCT],2,1),
       POL_ACCV_01.EXT_ACCV_ACCT_BRCH_01,
       SUBSTRING([EXT_RTRN_RI_ACCT],3,7),
       POL_ACCV_01.EXT_ACCV_ACT_NAME,
       POL_ACCV_01.EXT_ACCV_TZAC_CODE,
       POL_ACCV_01.EXT_ACCV_ACT_TYPE,
       POL_POLY.EXT_POLY_POL_BRANCH,
       SUBSTRING([EXT_RTRN_POLY_KEY],2,7),
       SUBSTRING([EXT_RTRN_POLY_KEY],9,3),
       [EXT_RTRN_RISK_NUMBER],
       [EXT_RTRN_RISK_CLASS],
       [EXT_RTRN_PREM_CLASS]

expression.expression: CAST((CASE WHEN (REPLACEMENT_PATH = 'PLACEHOLDER') THEN FullPath ELSE REPLACEMENT_PATH END) AS string)

properties.sqlQuery:
DECLARE @pPeriod VARCHAR(6);
SET @pPeriod = 'pPeriod_INPUT';

DECLARE @sYearStart VARCHAR(10);
SET @sYearStart = SUBSTRING(@pPeriod, 1, 4) + '0101';

SELECT
      SUBSTRING([EXT_CLRI_ACCT_KEY_CR],2,1) AS v_Company
      ,SUBSTRING([EXT_CLRI_ACCT_KEY_CR],3,7) AS v_Reinsurer
      ,[EXT_CLRI_PERIOD_CR] AS v_Period0
      ,[EXT_CLRI_PERIOD_CR1] AS v_Period1
      ,[EXT_CLRI_PERIOD_CR2] AS v_Period2
      ,[EXT_CLRI_PERIOD_CR3] AS v_Period3
      ,[EXT_CLRI_BAL_OUT_CR] AS v_BalOut0
      ,[EXT_CLRI_BAL_OUT_CR1] AS v_BalOut1
      ,[EXT_CLRI_BAL_OUT_CR2] AS v_BalOut2
      ,[EXT_CLRI_BAL_OUT_CR3] AS v_BalOut3
        ,POL_ACCV_01.EXT_ACCV_ACT_TYPE AS v_AccountType
        ,POL_ACCV_01.EXT_ACCV_ACCT_BRCH_01 AS v_AccountBranch
        ,POL_ACCV_01.EXT_ACCV_ACT_NAME AS v_AccountName
        ,POL_ACCV_01.EXT_ACCV_TZAC_CODE AS v_TZAC
        ,LEFT(POL_CLAV_CA.[EXT_CLAV_DATE_OCC_CA],4) AS v_AccidentYear
        ,POL_POLY.EXT_POLY_POL_BRANCH AS v_PolBranch
        ,SUBSTRING(POL_CLAV_CA.EXT_CLAV_RISK_KEY_CA,2,7) AS v_Policy
        ,SUBSTRING(POL_CLAV_CA.EXT_CLAV_RISK_KEY_CA,9,3) AS v_ProdClass
        ,SUBSTRING(POL_CLAV_CA.EXT_CLAV_RISK_KEY_CA,21,4) AS v_RiskNo
        ,POL_CLAV_CA.EXT_CLAV_RSK_CLASS_CA AS v_RiskClass
        ,POL_CLAV_CA.EXT_CLAV_SUB_CLASS_CA AS v_PremClass
        ,POL_CLAV_CA.EXT_CLAV_CLAM_BRCH_CA AS v_ClaimBranch
        ,SUBSTRING(POL_CLAV_CA.EXT_CLAV_CLAM_KEY_CA,3,7) AS v_ClaimNumber
        ,[EXT_CLRI_PPN_CR] AS v_Proportion
  FROM [FINDB].[src].[POL_CLRI]
  LEFT JOIN [FINDB].[src].[POL_CLAV_CA] ON POL_CLRI.EXT_CLRI_CLAM_KEY_CR = POL_CLAV_CA.EXT_CLAV_CLAM_KEY_CA
  LEFT JOIN [FINDB].[src].[POL_ACCV_01] ON POL_CLRI.EXT_CLRI_ACCT_KEY_CR = POL_ACCV_01.EXT_ACCV_ACCT_KEY_01
  LEFT JOIN [FINDB].[src].[POL_POLY] ON SUBSTRING(POL_CLAV_CA.EXT_CLAV_RISK_KEY_CA,1,11) = CONCAT(POL_POLY.EXT_POLY_POL_COMPANY, POL_POLY.EXT_POLY_POLICY, POL_POLY.EXT_POLY_POLS_TYPE)
  WHERE EXT_CLRI_TYPE_CR IN('RI','EL','CF')
  AND (POL_CLAV_CA.EXT_CLAV_CLAIM_STATUS_CA <> 'C'
  OR(POL_CLAV_CA.EXT_CLAV_CLAIM_STATUS_CA = 'C' AND POL_CLAV_CA.EXT_CLAV_STATUS_DATE_CA >= CAST(@sYearStart as int)))

    FROM AlteryxSelect_336
